ab: mapasahaala mas anak’anak.
tupaun a saikin tu Bukun, aiza’in laupaku tu mas’an hamisan.
en: My name is Bukun, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: tukua’un a isuu ngaan i?
tupaun a saikin tu Atul.
itumaaz tu siduh a kasu tu uvaaz i?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: ituBunun a saikin tu uvaaz.
adu Incumin amin a isuu tastulumah i?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: uung, Bunun amin a kaimin tastulumah.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是布農族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Bunun.

ab: adu Incumin amin a isuu tastulumah i?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: nii, maza inaak tama hai Bunun, maza inaak cina hai Ngaingai.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是布農族，我的媽媽是客家人。
en: No, my father is Bunun, and my mother is Hakka.

ab: isima a kasu tu uvaaz i?
itu’Alimus a saikin tu uvaaz.
adu isuu a adiipa tu tama i? pia’in a isaicia hamisan?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: aiza’in a saia tu manuumun hamisan.
adu isuu adiipa tu tama i? pia’in a isaicia hamisan?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: nii, maza saia hai inaam tu asang tu madadaingaz, mavau’unin a saia tu hamisan.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pia tu hamisan a isuu tuhasnanaz i?
mas’anhanvau’in tu hamisan a inaak tuhasnanaz.
adu mapahaisdaingaz a isaicia hamisan mas suu i?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: mapahais a kaimin tu ima hamisan.
pia a isuu kailaungkavan i?
tasasaba tu masipatun tu miciu a saikin.
malbuntuin nii tu mapasadu, adu tallaungkavin a kasu i?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: uung, tasasaba maciun tu miciu a saikin.
adu cismuhin a kasu i?
nii, salaliva a kasu.
adu situkulaazin a kasu i?
nii, cismuhin a saikin.
adu cismuhin a kasu i?
uung, maciunin tu kungking a saikin.
